translations.fr: Je peux te dire quelque chose.
translations.vi: Mình có thể nói với bạn một chuyện.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हें कुछ बता सकता हूँ।
translations.id: Aku bisa bilang sesuatu ke kamu.
translations.sv: Jag kan berätta något för dig.
translations.ja: 君にちょっと話がある。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular nominative personal pronoun functioning as the subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present, 1sg) expressing ability/possibility; selects the bare infinitive 'mitteilen' as the main verb.
2nd-person singular dative personal pronoun; indirect object (recipient) of 'mitteilen'.
Indefinite pronoun in accusative role; direct object denoting the content being communicated.
Separable lexical verb in bare infinitive (selected by the modal); core verb meaning 'to inform/communicate', taking a dative recipient and an accusative theme.

sentences.target: Sie muss uns die Änderung mitteilen.

translations.de: Sie muss uns die Änderung mitteilen.
translations.en: She has to tell us about the change.
translations.fr: Elle doit nous prévenir du changement.
translations.ko: 그녀는 변경 사항을 우리에게 알려야 해.
translations.ru: Она должна сообщить нам об изменении.
translations.pt: Ela precisa nos avisar da mudança.
translations.he: היא חייבת להודיע לנו על השינוי.
translations.vi: Cô ấy phải báo cho chúng tôi về sự thay đổi.
translations.nl: Ze moet ons de wijziging doorgeven.
translations.uk: Вона повинна повідомити нам про зміни.
translations.hi: उसे हमें बदलाव के बारे में बताना होगा।
translations.pl: Ona musi poinformować nas o zmianie.
translations.el: Πρέπει να μας ενημερώσει για την αλλαγή.
translations.nb: Hun må fortelle oss om endringen.
translations.id: Dia harus memberi tahu kami tentang perubahan itu.
translations.sv: Hon måste berätta för oss om förändringen.
translations.ro: Trebuie să ne anunțe despre schimbare.
translations.da: Hun skal fortælle os om ændringen.
translations.ja: 彼女はその変更について私たちに知らせなければならない。

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present, 3sg) expressing necessity/obligation; selects the bare infinitive 'mitteilen'.
1st-person plural dative personal pronoun; indirect object (recipient) of 'mitteilen'.
Definite article marking a specific feminine singular noun in accusative position.
Feminine singular common noun; accusative direct object (the content/theme communicated).
Separable lexical verb in bare infinitive (selected by the modal); core verb meaning 'to inform/communicate', taking dative recipient and accusative theme.

sentences.target: Der Arzt will mir die Diagnose mitteilen.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ aːʁtst vɪl miːɐ̯ diː diːaɡˈnoːzə ˈmɪtˌtaɪ̯lən/

translations.de: Der Arzt will mir die Diagnose mitteilen.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ aːʁtst vɪl miːɐ̯ diː diːaɡˈnoːzə ˈmɪtˌtaɪ̯lən/
translations.en: The doctor wants to tell me the diagnosis.
translations.es: El médico quiere decirme el diagnóstico.
translations.fr: Le médecin veut m’annoncer le diagnostic.
translations.it: Il medico vuole comunicarmi la diagnosi.
translations.ko: 의사가 내게 진단 결과를 알려 주려고 해.
translations.zh-Hans: 医生想把诊断结果告诉我。
translations.yue: 醫生想同我講診斷結果。
translations.pt: O médico quer me contar o diagnóstico.
translations.he: הרופא רוצה להגיד לי את האבחנה.
translations.vi: Bác sĩ muốn nói cho tôi biết chẩn đoán.
translations.nl: De arts wil me de diagnose vertellen.
translations.hu: Az orvos el akarja mondani nekem a diagnózist.
translations.hi: डॉक्टर मुझे निदान बताना चाहता है।
translations.el: Ο γιατρός θέλει να μου πει τη διάγνωση.
translations.id: Dokter ingin memberi tahu saya diagnosisnya.
translations.sv: Läkaren vill berätta diagnosen för mig.
translations.ro: Medicul vrea să îmi spună diagnosticul.
translations.ja: 医者は私に診断を伝えたいと思っている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking a specific masculine singular noun in nominative position.
Masculine singular common noun; nominative head of the subject NP.
Modal auxiliary (present, 3sg) expressing volition; selects the bare infinitive 'mitteilen'.
1st-person singular dative personal pronoun; indirect object (recipient) of 'mitteilen'.
Definite article marking a specific feminine singular noun in accusative position.
Feminine singular common noun; accusative direct object (the content/theme communicated).
Separable lexical verb in bare infinitive (selected by the modal); core verb meaning 'to inform/communicate', taking dative recipient and accusative theme.

sentences.target: Ich darf die Nachricht noch nicht mitteilen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç daʁf diː ˈnaːxʁɪçt nɔx nɪçt ˈmɪtˌtaɪ̯lən/

translations.de: Ich darf die Nachricht noch nicht mitteilen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç daʁf diː ˈnaːxʁɪçt nɔx nɪçt ˈmɪtˌtaɪ̯lən/
translations.en: I’m not allowed to share the news yet.
translations.es: Aún no puedo contar la noticia.
translations.fr: Je n’ai pas encore le droit d’annoncer la nouvelle.
translations.it: Non posso ancora dare la notizia.
translations.ko: 아직 그 소식을 말하면 안 돼.
translations.zh-Hans: 我还不能透露这个消息。
translations.yue: 我仲未可以講呢個消息。
translations.ru: Мне пока нельзя сообщать эту новость.
translations.pt: Ainda não posso divulgar a notícia.
translations.he: אסור לי עדיין לספר את החדשות.
translations.vi: Tôi vẫn chưa được phép chia sẻ tin này.
translations.ar: لا يُسمح لي بمشاركة الخبر بعد.
translations.nl: Ik mag het nieuws nog niet delen.
translations.uk: Мені ще не можна ділитися цією новиною.
translations.hu: Még nem oszthatom meg a hírt.
translations.hi: मुझे अभी यह खबर साझा करने की अनुमति नहीं है।
translations.pl: Jeszcze nie mogę przekazać tej wiadomości.
translations.el: Δεν επιτρέπεται ακόμα να μοιραστώ τα νέα.
translations.nb: Jeg har ikke lov til å dele nyheten ennå.
translations.id: Saya belum diizinkan untuk membagikan kabar ini.
translations.sv: Jag får inte dela nyheten ännu.
translations.ro: Încă nu am voie să dau vestea.
translations.da: Jeg må ikke dele nyheden endnu.
translations.ja: まだその知らせを伝えることは許されていない。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular nominative personal pronoun functioning as the subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present, 1sg) expressing permission/authorization; selects the bare infinitive 'mitteilen'.
Definite article marking a specific feminine singular noun in accusative position.
Feminine singular common noun; accusative direct object (the content/theme).
Temporal adverb expressing 'still/yet'; together with 'nicht' yields the meaning 'not yet'.
Negation particle; scopes over the VP with 'noch' to express 'not yet'.
Separable lexical verb in bare infinitive (selected by the modal); core verb meaning 'to inform/communicate', with a dative recipient and accusative theme (here negated and temporally constrained).
